content.en:
Knowing the existence of the Soul Saint Realm, Ye Tian immediately arranged for the Terran domain ancestors to enter the Soul Saint Realm to cultivate.

Ye Tian's body also entered the Soul Saint Realm to cultivate, and with the help of the treasure of the Soul Saint Realm, he continued to refine his soul.

In terms of cultivation, the refining of the Holy Body is assisted by ancestral medicine, and the pure power has the Infinite Domain Method, which is the Ancestral Method, while the refining of the soul can only rely on a few treasures, and the refining effect is very average.

But now, with the assistance of the Soul Saint Realm, there is no need to worry about refining the soul.

Maybe it won't be too long, Ye Tian will be able to use the Soul Saint Realm to refine his soul to the limit of the current realm, and when the time comes, after the domain body and domain power are cultivated to the extreme and pure, he will be able to impact the top domain ancestor realm.

Moreover, in the future, Ye Tian will have more hope when he hits the Invincible Domain Ancestor Realm.

After all, he has a Soul Saint Realm, and he can also go to the Soul Saint Realm of the Battle Gate in the future, which is equivalent to one more chance to enter the Soul Saint Realm to cultivate than other geniuses, so the hope of giving birth to the Soul Holy Light is naturally much greater.

What's more, the Xuanxu Saint Realm may also give birth to a second Soul Saint Realm or even a third Soul Saint Realm in the future.

If, after a long time, the Xuanxu Saint Realm evolved into the Xuanxu Ancestral Realm, then a little chance would be enough to make Ye Tian make great progress.

Ye Tian originally wanted to continue cultivating in the Soul Saint Realm of the Xuanxu Saint Realm, but something happened on this day.

Inside the War Tower.

Ye Tian's copy body received a summons from the Battle Gate, and there was a meeting for him to attend.

As the first saint son of the Battle Gate and the Elite Domain Ancestor, Ye Tian's status in the Battle Gate is not low now, so it is normal for him to attend the meeting.

However, this meeting was not simple.

Ye Tian had also participated in a few meetings before, but they were basically meetings between a few Supreme Domain Ancestors and a large number of top Domain Ancestors, and the things they talked about were also small things.

But this time it was different.

When Ye Tian appeared in an exclusive independent space of the Battle Realm Tower, a supreme domain ancestor appeared, and there were many invincible domain ancestors.

And there are some top domain ancestors, but there are not many of them, and they are all the holy sons of the battle gate.

The one with the lowest cultivation is naturally Ye Tian, but under the Supreme Domain Ancestor, Ye Tian's status is the highest, after all, the other Holy Sons are under him.

"So many Invincible Domain Ancestors have appeared, this meeting is not simple!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

The Invincible Domain Ancestor who presided over this meeting was Ye Tian's old acquaintance, the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor!

Seeing that the arrival of the people was almost there, the Ancestor of the Blood Gang Domain looked at Ye Tian.

At this time, the eyes of many domain ancestors were also staring at Ye Tian.

"It's ......"

When Ye Tian saw this scene, he felt that this meeting was probably related to him, otherwise so many domain ancestors would not all be staring at him.

The Ancestor of the Blood Gang Domain said, "Ten Thousand Laws Holy Son, this meeting has something to do with you. Now that news has come out, the realm you are in has evolved into a super-large realm, and a holy realm has been born, and a soul saint realm has also been born in the holy realm, this should be true, right?"

Ye Tian's expression moved, and he finally knew the reason.

It turns out that the root of everything comes from the Soul Saint Realm, and the Battle Gate already knows the existence of the Soul Saint Realm!

But if you think about it carefully, it's right to think about it, how precious the Soul Saint Realm is, maybe no one knows about it at first, but the domain ancestors of the human race will definitely not completely block the news of the Soul Saint Realm, and after the other domain ancestors understand it, they will almost know about the Soul Saint Realm when they check it in the Battle Realm Tower.

Moreover, the evolution of the Daoshan Realm, everyone knows about this.

The half-step domain ancestors and domain ancestors of the Daoshan Realm can all enter the Battle Realm Tower, and if anyone leaks the news, the evolution of the Daoshan Realm cannot be hidden.

Therefore, the evolution of the Daoshan Realm attracted the attention of the Battle Gate.

After all, the birth of a Saint Realm and the birth of a Soul Saint Realm are not a trivial matter.

Few of those sects in the Dark Sacred Realm mastered the Holy Realm, and only those few sects that had fallen down from the Holy Land could master a Sacred Realm.

Of course, those sects would not have crossed such a long territory and went to the Dao Mountain Realm to occupy a Saint Realm, it was not worth it.

After all, their foundation is in the Dark Sacred Domain, and compared to the Dark Sacred Domain, the Dao Mountain Realm is not worth mentioning, at least not at the moment.

However, the resources of the birth of a holy realm were of great interest to many domain ancestors.

Moreover, the value of the Soul Saint Realm was very high, and even these Supreme Domain Ancestors would be moved.

"It's true!"

Ye Tian admitted.

There is no way to deny this matter, there are so many Dao Mountain Realm cultivators who have entered the Battle Realm Tower, and it is useless for him to deny it alone.

The Ancestor of the Blood Gang Domain said again: "Ten Thousand Laws Holy Son, we don't know why your realm was promoted, but the value of a Saint Realm and Soul Saint Realm is very high. Many Supreme Domain Ancestors are struggling with the issue of Soul Holy Light, the Soul Saint Realm of the Dark Saint Realm is basically in the hands of the Ten Great Holy Gates and some Holy Lands, and it is difficult for those Supreme Domain Ancestors to obtain the quota to enter the Soul Saint Realm, even if they can enter it occasionally, but the cultivation time is too short. Therefore, the Soul Saint Realm born in your realm is afraid that it will attract many Supreme Domain Ancestors. More importantly, if the Soul Saint Realm gave birth to the Soul Saint Realm Flower, it would be able to create an invincible domain ancestor. Therefore, there must be many supreme domain ancestors who covet the Soul Saint Realm. "

"I understand!"

Ye Tian nodded.

The Blood Gang Domain Ancestor continued: "For that Soul Saint Realm, many Domain Ancestors of the Battle Gate are also very interested, and many Domain Ancestors want to enter the Soul Saint Realm of your realm to cultivate for a period of time, so open this meeting to ask for your opinion!"

"No opinion!" Ye Tian hurriedly said: "However, these domain ancestors must not cause trouble when they enter my territory, and they must obey my arrangement, if they are unwilling, then don't come!"

"No problem!"

The Blood Gang Domain Ancestor nodded.

The other Supreme Domain Ancestors also nodded, they didn't want to care about other things, they only thought about cultivation.

After all, entering the new Soul Saint Realm to cultivate, this is also an opportunity for them, and it is also a chance for nothing.

The reason why Ye Tian agreed was not to give face to the battle door, but because the news of the Soul Saint Realm must have been exposed, and the Dark Saint Realm coveted this supreme domain ancestor of the Soul Saint Realm was many, many.

It is difficult for him to resist on his own, and the domain ancestors of the battle gate are willing to come, that is a good thing, at least it can deter other supreme domain ancestors!

Subsequently.

The crowd discussed it and determined the approximate number of places.

This time, the Battle Gate will send 200 Supreme Domain Ancestors and 30,000 Top Domain Ancestors to the Soul Saint Realm.

It's not that the Battle Gate doesn't want to send more, but if there are too many people, the Soul Saint Realm can't support too many people to participate in enlightenment and cultivation, so it can only send such a few people.
